THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAN, PAK SHING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MICKELSON, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 423 MELROSE AVENUE, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94127 $5,625.00 RENT, $542.49 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,167.49, LEASE FORFEITED, (PER DECLARATION CCP 585(D), DEFENDANT WILL BE EVICTED BY THE SHERIFF ON NOV. 15, 2005. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
